title: Junior Business Development Manager at Oberoi Mall

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Oberoi Mall
jsonLd.description:
Oberoi Mall, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Oberoi Mall:
Oberoi Mall is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Mall!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
